name: Tutorial Island
tagline: Low-stakes starter chaos for people still reading the wiki.
designNotes: Starter-friendly set; good for onboarding users into collections.

name: Clark Hall Subscription Plan
tagline: For users who accidentally became part of the furniture at Clark.
designNotes: Campus/place-based set centered around recurring Queen's/Clark-style lore.

name: Couch Potato Canon Event
tagline: Movie-marathon brainrot, but make it a tradition.
designNotes: Pop-culture and watch-through set; funny, themed, and easy to understand in-app.

name: Controller Damage Waiver
tagline: Friendships were tested. Controllers may not survive.
designNotes: Gaming/social set; compact enough to feel achievable.

name: Jacket Construction Permit
tagline: For people who saw empty cans and thought: infrastructure.

name: Residence Side-Quest Any%
tagline: The residence lore iceberg, unfortunately, is real.
designNotes: Residence/social-lore set; several items may need safer rewrites before MVP use.

name: Final Boss Liver DLC
tagline: The wiki looked at moderation and chose violence.
designNotes: Highest-intensity legacy set. Treat as reference/lore unless rewritten safely for the app.
